zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby於1302年1月6日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby29歲，母親Baroness Margaret Deincourt26歲。他於1323年7月2日與Joane Roscelin在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1349年6月13日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby于1302年1月6日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby29岁，母亲Baroness Margaret Deincourt26岁。他于1323年7月2日与Joane Roscelin在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1349年6月13日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby was born on 6 January 1302, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, was 29 and his mother, Baroness Margaret Deincourt, was 26. He married Joane Roscelin on 2 July 1323, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 June 1349, in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Joane Roscelin le 2 juillet 1323, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1349, à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby am 6. Januar 1302 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby 29 und seine Mutter Baroness Margaret Deincourt 26. Er hat am 2. Juli 1323 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Joane Roscelin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Juni 1349 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresbyが1302年1月6日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresbyは29歳，母Baroness Margaret Deincourtは26歳であった。1323年7月2日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーでJoane Roscelinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1349年6月13日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイにて埋葬された。

ko.Spilsby, Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby(이)가 1302년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margaret Deincourt(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1323년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 Joane Roscelin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1349년 6월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1302, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margaret Deincourt, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Roscelin em 2 de julho de 1323, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1349, em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Spilsby, Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Willoughby, 2nd Baron of Eresby родился 6 января 1302 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margaret Deincourt, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Roscelin 2 июля 1323 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 июня 1349 г. в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
